free_text: Activation measurements of the integral cross
Irradiation tine varied from 3 to 11 hours.
Two types of targets were used:
1. Stacked targets consisted of thin copper foil, LiF
evaporated onto backing and deposited on 200 mu-m Cu
foil, and thick copper foil (200 mu-m).
2. Stacked targets consisted of seven aluminum foils.
LiF layer was deposited onto the second aluminum foil.
